tools.name: analyze_deal
tools.description: Analyze a multifamily real estate deal. Returns cap rate, cash-on-cash, DSCR, IRR, DFP Score (0-100), max offer price, and full financial projections.

monthly_income.description: Total monthly rental income in dollars

monthly_expenses.description: Total monthly operating expenses in dollars

tools.name: score_deal
tools.description: Quick-score a multifamily deal on the DFP 0-100 scale. Returns the DFP Score, verdict, and key metrics. Faster than full analysis.

monthly_income.description: Total monthly rental income in dollars

monthly_expenses.description: Total monthly operating expenses in dollars

tools.name: reverse_calc
tools.description: Calculate the maximum offer price for a multifamily deal based on target return metrics. Back-solves from desired cap rate, cash-on-cash, DSCR, and/or IRR.

monthly_income.description: Total monthly rental income in dollars

monthly_expenses.description: Total monthly operating expenses in dollars

targets.description: Target return metrics - provide at least one

tools.name: market_data
tools.description: Look up market intelligence for a property address. Returns flood zone, neighborhood income relative to state median, and job growth rate.

address.description: Full property address including city and state
